message:
test(fcp-streaming,fcp-testkit): expand streaming and testkit test suites

fcp-streaming: +72 tests across error, reconnect, sse, stream, websocket modules
fcp-testkit: +66 tests across mock_server, async_harness, harness, tracing_config, supervisor_examples

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
